title: Yomiko West Highland Terrier (Small) SITTING
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Suki Gifts Classics, Dogs - Small West Highland Terrier
White soft caress plush toy with airbrushed details to the face
Part of the Classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Supersoft plush small West Highland Terrier from Suki International Gifts' famous Yomiko Classics Dog collection. Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Yomiko Classics are a world famous brand offering a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features.Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Yomiko Classics range of sitting and lying Cats, Dogs and Jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Suki Gifts are an innovative British company, providing high quality gifts and soft toys including Baby, Teddy Bears, Plush toys, Mugs, Piggy Banks and much more. Safety Warning Please remove all tags before giving to children Box Contains 1 x Small West Highland Terrier See more
